metadata.description: Premium dog training business MVP with public booking and private admin dashboard.

identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode, Silver & Red Accents, Modern, Polished

theme.strategy: The app defaults to dark mode. The toggle allows users to switch, but the primary brand identity is built on dark surfaces.

typography.instructions: Use Montserrat for all Headings (h1-h4) to give a premium, athletic feel. Use Inter for body text for maximum readability.

public_landing.structure: Hero Section -> Services Grid -> Process Steps -> Contact/Footer
public_landing.hero_style: Full viewport height (min-h-screen) with dark overlay image and bold centered typography.
public_landing.grid_style: Bento Grid or Asymmetrical Grid for services. Use silver borders for accents.

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left) -> Top Bar (Breadcrumbs/User) -> Main Content Area
admin_dashboard.grid_style: High Density Grid (3-4 columns). Cards for metrics. Tables for booking lists.
admin_dashboard.card_style: Flat background (zinc-900) with subtle 1px border (zinc-800). No heavy shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-red-700 shadow-glow transition-all duration-300 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm p-6

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_images.alt: Sleek black Great Dane on dark background

content_images.alt: White and black short coated dog

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1). Use lighter grey (zinc-300) on dark backgrounds, never dark grey.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible red ring (ring-2 ring-red-600) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.semantic_html: Use proper heading hierarchy (h1 -> h2 -> h3). Use <main>, <nav>, <aside> landmarks.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, keep them solid or subtle noise.
Do NOT use Inter for Headings, use Montserrat.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use generic AI emojis.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Datepicker, Dialog, etc).
Never center align the app container text-align globally.
Do not use transparent backgrounds on headers without blur/scrim.
